query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(DISTINCT lineUserId) as unique_users, COUNT(storeName) as has_store, COUNT(totalAmount) as has_amount, MIN(submittedAt) as earliest, MAX(submittedAt) as latest FROM line_receipts;
